income.note: Net = gross minus 2026 income tax (0% to EUR22k, then 20/25/30/35%), 8.8% social insurance, 2.65% GHS. Monthly basis.

rents.note: Median asking rents (monthly EUR) for apartments, from live property-portal listings (Bazaraki/Spitogatos), June 2026. Sample sizes per district/size run from ~120 to ~1,470, except Famagusta, which is thin and holiday-skewed: its 2-bed (~23 listings) is used and its 1- and 3-bed are scaled from it. Asking rents run above what tenancies settle at.

buy.note: Median asking prices (EUR) for apartments, from live property-portal listings (Bazaraki/Spitogatos), June 2026, sample sizes ~75 to ~4,960. These are asking prices and run above transaction (closing) prices. Famagusta is bimodal (mainstream stock plus Ayia Napa luxury), so its 3-bed median sits close to its 2-bed.

sizesSqm.note: Median floor area (m2) of listed apartments for sale, from the portal sample, used for price-per-m2.

geo.note: Approximate coordinates of each district's main urban centre (Republic-controlled area).

trends.note: Indexed to 2020 = 100. Wages: CYSTAT average gross earnings. Official rent: Eurostat HICP actual rentals (sitting tenants). Asking rent: author's index from listings. RPPI: CBC transaction purchase prices, Q4 readings reindexed to 2020Q4=100.

cbcRppi.note: CBC Residential Property Price Index (RPPI), transaction (closing) prices. Index base 2010Q1=100. Q4 figures unless noted.

overburden.note: Eurostat EU-SILC ilc_lvho07a/07c, 2024. Share of population spending >40% of disposable income on housing.

tenure.note: Central Bank of Cyprus / Eurostat. Share of households.

buyers2025.note: Department of Lands & Surveys, 2025. Shares of residential sales documents.

prices.note: CBC RPPI Q4 2025; new housing loans CBC MFI statistics.
prices.newHousingLoansNote: Year-on-year growth in new housing loans (CBC MFI statistics). Rising lending reflects demand chasing a thin supply of homes to buy — not proof that mortgages have become affordable.

mortgage.note: Central Bank of Cyprus, bank product sheets, 2026.

supply.note: CYSTAT Census 2021 (official); permit data CYSTAT 2025; gap and idle-stock figures are attributed estimates.
supply.decadeGapEstimateSource: Sector estimate aired at a 2026 housing-policy discussion in Nicosia (reported by Cyprus Property News) — attributed, not an official census figure.

foreignTrend.note: Non-EU transfers of immovable property (DLS, via Parliament/auditor-general).

context.whyLowBurden: A large share of owners hold their home outright — often inherited or family-built, in a country where mortgage finance came late and family support is the norm. Cost-free owners drag the all-household average down.

flow2026.note: DLS sales + CYSTAT building permits, January 2026 (gov.cy). janResidentialValueYoY is the year-on-year growth in the VALUE of approved residential building (to EUR 336.6m); the dwelling-unit count grew 109.4% separately.

schemes.name: Young-buyer grant (under 41)
schemes.detail: EUR20,000-50,000 toward a first home (max 150m²), across the 2024 and 2025 calls.
schemes.reach: 525 applied for a scheme built to house ~400; 152 approved, 200 still pending

schemes.name: Reduced VAT on first home
schemes.detail: 5% on a primary residence vs 19% otherwise.
schemes.reach: Helps buyers who can already buy

schemes.name: CLDC Affordable Rent
schemes.detail: EUR16M Agios Nikolaos (Limassol); EUR12M for 54 units in Strovolos; 181 units started 2025, 258 more in 2026.
schemes.reach: Hundreds of units against a ~43,000 gap

schemes.name: Renovate-Rent
schemes.detail: EUR15,000-35,000 grants to return vacant homes to affordable rent for 4 years; EUR25M budget, 1,000-unit target.

schemes.name: Planning density bonus
schemes.detail: Up to +45% building density if part is residential; forecast ~10,000 homes in 2 years.

schemes.name: Mortgage-to-Rent
schemes.detail: Suspends foreclosure on a primary residence for applicants since Jan 2024.
